Beverages
Our Cocktail Program is curated in collaboration with globally acclaimed Mixologist Danilo Bozovic of Employees Only voted #1 Cocktail Bar in the world. Enjoy!
EXOTIC COCKTAILS
Lychee Martini
Wheatley Vodka, House Yuzu Liqueur, Lychee Purée, Sake Spritz, Fresh Lime
Golden Sunrise
Corazón Blanco Tequila, Turmeric Habanero Tincture, Egg White, Gran Gala Orange Liqueur, Fresh Lime
Hanoi Coffee
Dulce De Leche Washed Helix Vodka, Café du Monde Coffee
Green Makrut Gimlet
Makrut Lime Leaf Infused Askur Gin, Lemongrass, Cucumber, Chlorophyll, Fresh Lime
Forbidden City
Sake, Rhum Agricole, Pineapple Juice, Basil, Pineapple Shrub, Fresh Lime
Saigon Tea
Askur Gin, Shochu, Lush Orchard, Yuzu, Fresh Lemon, Q Tonic
French Kiss
Le Colonial Private Barrel Knob Creek Rye, Hibiscus Herb Honey, Housemade Yuzu Liqueur, Orgeat & Bol's Elderflower
SIGNATURE COCKTAILS
Le Colonial
Corazon Anejo Tequila, Kikkoman Plum Wine, Absinthe Mist, Egg White, Fresh Mint, Fresh Lime
Old Cuban
Brugal 1888 Rum, Demerara, Aromatic Bitters, Champagne, Fresh Mint
Smoked Old Fashioned
Le Colonial Private Barrel Maker's Mark Bourbon, Enriched Syrup & Compressed Orange Bitters
MOCKTAILS
Saigon Mint Colada
Coconut Milk, Fresh Pineapple, Fresh Lime, Fresh Mint, Turmeric, Fresh Nutmeg
Le Diable
Fresh Pomegranate, Ginger Root, Cilantro, Fresh Lime, Pomegranate Molasses, Q Ginger Beer
Shaken Black Teas
Choice of: White Peach, Hibiscus Herb Honey, Lychee
DESSERT
Apple Tarte Tatin
Salted Caramel Sauce, Candied Five Spice Walnuts, Vanilla Ice Cream
Vanilla Crème Brûlée
Madagascar Vanilla Bean Custard with Crispy Caramel Crust, Fresh Berries, Honey Lemon Madeleine
Warm Chocolate Cake
Valrhona Guanaja Dark Chocolate, Vanilla Ice Cream, Chocolate Streusel, Flambée of Rum
Coconut Pineapple Upside Down Cake
Light Coconut Genoise, Coconut Ice Cream, Orange Scented Rum Sauce
Che Chuoi Organic Tapioca Pudding
Warm Coconut Tapioca, Caramelized Banana, Sesame Seed, Coconut Chips, Crème Anglaise
Gourmet Ice Cream & Sorbet
Three scoops of Ice Cream or Fresh Fruit Sorbet, served with Vanilla Sablé
Le Colonial Sundae Spécial
Gourmet Ice Cream, Caramelized Banana, Valrhona Chocolate Sauce, Crème Chantilly, Toasted Sliced Almonds, Vanilla Sablé
